jobs.descriptionSnippet: L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Bilingue FR/EN. The sky's the limit. A seat at the table, with the people who can actually move things, in a business that's already working. Now we're levelling up to what's next. If that landed, keep reading. Who we are It started with two founders, a basement, and a phone book. Two years of cold calls before there was even an office to make them from. The people running this floor today are the ones who did that work. They remember what it takes. jobs.title: Director, Product Management, Internet Services
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Xplore Inc. is Canada’s fibre, 5G and satellite broadband company for rural living. Xplore is committed to the relentless pursuit of an improved broadband experience for all Canadians. Xplore is building a world-class fibre optic and 5G wireless network to enable innovative broadband services for better every day rural living, for today and future generations. jobs.title: Product Manager fiduciary services and Pricing Strategy
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Product Manager within the National Bank Trust team means playing a strategic role at the heart of defining and executing strategies related to fiduciary products and the sector’s pricing strategy. In this key role, you contribute to the development and evolution of high value-added solutions-specifically our offering in estates, trusts, and philanthropy-by guiding decisions related to innovation, pricing, distribution, and product lifecycle management. jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: As one of Canada’s largest and fastest growing cryptocurrency trading platforms, Ndax has set the bar high for the country’s fintech industry and is constantly leading the way in terms of security and innovation. jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Role: Product Manager Location: Canada Remote Mode: Full-time Job Description: Manage end to end campaign execution across IVR, SMS, outbound calling, and agent supported channels. Coordinate cross functional readiness with IT, Compliance, Legal, Marketing, Operations, and vendors. Ensure regulatory and compliance approval for scripts, messaging, consent, and outreach rules.
